name: ARC Proposal
about: Propose a new Agent Request for Comments standard
title: "ARC-NNNN: [Title]"
labels: arc-proposal

---

## ARC Proposal

**Number**: ARC-NNNN (leave as-is; maintainers will assign)
**Title**:
**Lineage**: (e.g., "Inspired by RFC 793 — TCP" or "Original")
**Status**: DRAFT

## Abstract

_One paragraph describing what this ARC standardizes._

## Motivation

_Why does HERMES need this standard? What problem does it solve?_

## Specification

_The technical specification. Be precise. Include:_
- _Data formats_
- _Algorithms or procedures_
- _Validation rules_
- _Error handling_

## Compatibility

_How does this interact with existing ARCs? Does it extend, replace, or complement?_

## Reference Implementation

_Optional: link to a PR with a reference implementation, or describe the expected implementation._

## Security Considerations

_What are the security implications? How does this affect the firewall model?_

## Checklist

- [ ] Abstract is clear and self-contained
- [ ] Specification is implementable from this document alone
- [ ] No private or identifying data in the proposal
- [ ] Lineage (if any) is credited
- [ ] At least one author is willing to shepherd the proposal
